allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); const names = Object.keys\(p\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('chat'\)\); console.log\(names.slice\(0,10\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); const names = Object.keys\(p\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('quote'\)\); console.log\(names\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); const names = Object.keys\(p\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('quote'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('testimonial'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('speech'\)\); console.log\(names\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); const names = Object.keys\(p\).filter\(k => !k.includes\('Thin'\) && !k.includes\('Light'\) && !k.includes\('Bold'\) && !k.includes\('Fill'\) && !k.includes\('Duotone'\)\).slice\(0,50\); console.log\(names.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@phosphor-icons/react/dist/ssr'\); const names = Object.keys\(p\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('chat'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('star'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('message'\)\); console.log\(names.slice\(0,20\)\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import * as p from '@phosphor-icons/react/dist/ssr/index.js'; const names = Object.keys\(p\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('chat'\)\); console.log\(names\);")
